title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE PHILIPPINES DURING THE PERIOD FROM JULY 1, 1969 TO JUNE 20, 1970 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 18676 / 66 OG No. 15, 3723 (April 13, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6050*, April 13, 1970 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE PHILIPPINES DURING THE PERIOD FROM JULY 1, 1969 TO JUNE 20, 1970 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.
